pr.title: feat(inventory): add founder unmatched review queue and views
pr.rollback: Revert PR3 commit(s); optionally drop new queue/views/function.

receipt.goal: Build founder visibility into canonical inventory matching and unmatched/no-match queue without changing public UX boundaries.
verification_steps: No-match fallback inserts inventory_search_events row and logs/updates inventory_unmatched_queue via RPC
Repeated same normalized unmatched term increments times_seen and updates last_seen_at
Matched quick-add path remains garage_items insert flow
No-match path still creates no garage_items row
Founder review views exist: v_inventory_dictionary_review and v_inventory_unmatched_review
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert PR3 branch commit(s); optionally drop new queue/views/function.
